notes: Form-binary archetype peer of checkbox + toggle. Always circular (border-radius:50%) — no progressive radius axis. Indicator is an inner dot rather than a checkmark glyph.
Variant pair is filled (solid circle-on) + outlined (transparent off, filled on). No soft/ghost — the indicator surface must always render.
Two dimension axes: circle-size (outer) and dot-size (inner, ~45% of outer). Both scale across the 10 density modes.
Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral remap via [data-role=...] overriding --brand-* palette vars at the component scope (see radio.css).
aria-invalid='true' forces danger-coloured border and (when checked) danger-coloured fill, regardless of role. Invalid is a STATE, not a role.
Companion .radio-group wraps multiple radios with vertical/horizontal layout via [data-direction]. Group-gap tokens are non-density (single value per orientation).
